name: oh-my-zz
description: A focused engineering skill pack for idea refinement, reviewed specification-and-plan bundles, brief dated change plans, design interrogation, secure session handoffs, bounded contract-driven review-and-fix, project-memory initialization with opt-in agent discovery, proposal-first architecture synchronization, pre-merge review decisions, and simplification.
